title: soda stocksii
intro: Soda stocksii, commonly known as Sida rhombifolia, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, due to its health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Soda stocksii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of the plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Soda stocksii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, gastrointestinal issues, and interact with certain medications.
